---
title: "PCSXR 1.9.92 metal gear solid 'segmentation fault' after cutscene."
date: 2011-07-23
forum: Gaming &amp; Leisure
---

### Post by freshmeat20 on 2011-07-23
Getting a seg fault after a specific cutscene. Was wondering how to track back to find out what it is. tried using the default drivers and turning graphics down etc but still shuts down right after..

Heres the results for catchsegv

### Post by freshmeat20 on 2011-07-24
Bump. Got it to work past the first seg fault by making a new game and just using xvideo drivers. Now theres another one when talking to otacon the first time. Just a guess but it looks like it happens when going from 3d cutscene to a video clip (ex. rl video of a rocket, new york, etc) How can I trace this?

---
